author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Amitabha Sadhana - Questions and Answers
content:
The Venerable Sangharakshita

Questions and Answers held on the Amitabha Sadhana Retreat
December 1991
Contents
1-5 Amitabha and Amitayus
2-3 Light and infinite light
6 The mudra(s) of Amitabha - holding up the lotus and the
dhyana mudra
6-7 Roses and lotuses
11 The median nerve
13 Seeing and hearing mantras
The Abhadhuti and Abhadhuta - median nerve and the
sanyassin
15-18 Bhante's seeking ordination after his vision of Amitabha
The cave where Bhante had his vision of Amitabha
19 The place of visualisation in the FWBO/WBO's system of
practice?
20 Bhante encouraging people to send him Dharma questions
The colour of Amitabha's eyes
21 Improvising or keeping closely to Buddhist tradition in
visualisation
